summary: Iteration 5 testing BLOCKED by a P0 runtime crash in DraftScreen.jsx → SlotSpinner component. The very first click of 'ZAR AT' (roll dice) throws 'ReferenceError: ALL_TEAM_LABELS is not defined' AND uses an unimported 'useEffect' hook, which crashes the entire React tree (body collapses to 'Made with Emergent'). No user can complete a draft → so none of the iteration-5 fixes (knockout/final flow, ET ticker, penalty reveal, 2-leg swap, post-group summary, speed picker, Ballon d'Or 99) can be reached at runtime. Source-code review confirms the iteration-5 fixes themselves are correctly wired (verified in matchEngine.js, MatchScreen.jsx, TournamentScreen.jsx, ballonDor.js, PlayerCard.jsx, App.js handleClose path) but they remain UNTESTED in the browser due to the SlotSpinner blocker. A second visible bug: App.js line 173 has an extra '}' that renders as a stray text node at the bottom-left of every screen.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL BLOCKER. Clicking the roll-dice-button throws PAGEERROR: ALL_TEAM_LABELS is not defined and crashes the whole React tree. Root cause: (1) SlotSpinner uses useEffect at line 282 but the file only imports {useState, useMemo} on line 1 — useEffect is undefined. (2) ALL_TEAM_LABELS is referenced on lines 281, 283, 286 but is NOT defined or imported anywhere in /app/frontend/src/. grep -rn 'ALL_TEAM_LABELS' returns ONLY those three reference lines. Console captured warning 'An error occurred in the <SlotSpinner> component' and after the error the entire body innerText collapses to 'Made with Emergent'. Reproduces 100% on a fresh state (localStorage cleared → start draft → roll dice).

Stray '}' character rendered as a JSX text node at bottom-left of every screen. Source line ends with '}} />}}' — one extra closing brace ends up inside the outer JSX expression and is emitted as text. Visible in every screenshot directly above 'Made with Emergent'.

integration_issues.flow: Draft → Confirm → Tactics → Tournament → Knockout → Final
integration_issues.issue: Entire flow is unreachable in the browser because draft cannot be completed (SlotSpinner crash on first roll). All iteration-5 features are runtime-untested.

action_items: P0 / BLOCKER — Fix DraftScreen.jsx SlotSpinner: (a) add 'useEffect' to the React import on line 1, (b) define or import an ALL_TEAM_LABELS array of {label, crest} objects (suggested: derive from CHAMPIONS in /app/frontend/src/data/champions.js, e.g. const ALL_TEAM_LABELS = CHAMPIONS.map(c => ({ label: `${c.season} ${c.club}`, crest: c.crest })) — declared at module scope, outside the SlotSpinner function).
P1 — Fix App.js line 173: change '}} />}}' to '}} />}' so the extra '}' stops rendering as a stray text node at bottom-left.

After both fixes, re-run iteration-5 e2e flow: roll dice → SlotSpinner spins → 11 placements → confirm → tactics → tournament → MD1-6 → post_group summary → 'SON 16'A İLERLE' → R16 leg1+leg2 (verify pair.away on LEFT in leg 2 with 'RÖVANŞ' header) → ET events with minute>=91 in ticker (force a draw test) → penalty-block with pen-shot reveals → close → QF→SF→Final → close → TrophyScreen triggers AFTER close (no 'Kazandın' spam during sim).
Verify Ballon d'Or names (Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo, Kakà, Modrić, Benzema, Ronaldinho, Zidane, etc.) display OVR=99 and 'tier-blackicon' card across any pool seed.
critical_code_review_comments: BLOCKER /app/frontend/src/screens/DraftScreen.jsx lines 1, 281-286: 'useEffect' is referenced inside SlotSpinner but only 'useState, useMemo' are imported. 'ALL_TEAM_LABELS' is referenced 3 times but never declared/imported anywhere in /app/frontend/src/. Causes uncaught ReferenceError on the very first roll → whole React tree unmounts.

/app/frontend/src/App.js line 173: '}} />}}' should be '}} />}' — the extra '}' renders as a stray text node visible at the bottom-left of every page (confirmed via document.body.innerText ending in '\n}').

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/MatchScreen.jsx (lines 41-49, 138-153, 220-232, 244-260, 263-269): per-leg home/away swap, ticker → penalty phase transition with slower reveal (baseDelay = max(550, speed*2)ms), aggregate-result block, user-result block, close-match-button + next-leg-button all wired with data-testids exactly as the request specifies. finishedRef guard prevents double-close. SpeedPicker with speed-slow|normal|fast|ultra + localStorage SPEED_KEY persistence — verified.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/engine/matchEngine.js (lines 178-202): simulateExtraTime now returns {home, away, events} with minute 91-120 events tagged 'UZATMADA GOL' / 'UZATMA kurtarış' and merged into leg2.events (line 153) or single-match events (line 170). simulatePenalties returns {a, b, shots[]} with side/scored/round/sudden — matches MatchScreen consumption.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/TournamentScreen.jsx (lines 168-179): playFinal no longer calls onTrophy — it sets championRef on the match payload only, and App.js line 169 triggers setTrophyTeam only AFTER MatchScreen's onClose fires. Eliminates the 'Kazandın' spam during simulation.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/TournamentScreen.jsx (lines 89-96, 205-228, 270-276): post_group stage with 'SON 16'A İLERLE' button (data-testid='advance-to-r16-button') and group tables — exactly as specified.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/data/ballonDor.js effOverall(player) returns 99 for any name in BALLON_DOR_WINNERS; PlayerCard.jsx line 41 and 79-83 use effOverall and isBallonDor for OVR display + tier-blackicon + BALLON D'OR badge. /app/frontend/src/engine/overallEngine.js: confirmed via grep to import { effOverall } from data/ballonDor.

success_rate.frontend: 0% runtime e2e (blocked by SlotSpinner crash at the first roll). ~95% source-code review of iteration-5 deltas — all logic appears correct but cannot be exercised.

test_credentials: none required (no auth in this app)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Once main agent (a) adds useEffect to the React import in DraftScreen.jsx and (b) defines ALL_TEAM_LABELS (suggested from CHAMPIONS array), and (c) removes the stray '}' in App.js line 173, re-run a full e2e: clear localStorage → BAŞLA → fill team-name-input → click [data-testid='formation-4-3-3'] (NOT formation-continue-button which is also matched by ^=formation- selector!) → click formation-continue-button → roll-dice-button → wait ~1200ms for ZAR DÖNÜYOR overlay to disappear → click pool-player-* → click an empty slot on the Pitch → repeat 11 times → confirm-continue-button → pick a tactic → tactics-continue → playMatchday x6 → expect state.stage='post_group' → advance-to-r16-button → play-r16-button → MatchScreen modal: LEG 1 then next-leg-button then LEG 2 (header should contain 'RÖVANŞ', home-name should show pair.away.label, away-name should show pair.home.label) → if tied, ET events with minute 91+ flow through ticker, then if still tied phase transitions to 'penalties' showing penalty-block with pen-shot circles revealing one-by-one with ~600ms delay → close-match-button → repeat through QF/SF/Final → on Final close, TrophyScreen appears (no trophy fired during the modal). Also verify speed-picker switches speed and persists to localStorage SPEED_KEY='ucl_match_speed_v1'. Verify Ballon d'Or 99 by rolling enough times to draw a pool containing Messi/CR7/Kakà → PlayerCard shows OVR 99 + tier-blackicon class.
rca of the issue: Iteration-5 introduced a slot-machine SlotSpinner in DraftScreen.jsx that depends on (a) the React useEffect hook and (b) a module-level constant ALL_TEAM_LABELS — but neither is imported/declared. useEffect was simply missed in the destructured React import on line 1; ALL_TEAM_LABELS was likely intended to be derived from CHAMPIONS (data/champions.js) or seasons.js but was never added. As soon as rolling=true and SlotSpinner mounts (line 207), React evaluates `Math.floor(Math.random() * ALL_TEAM_LABELS.length)` which throws a ReferenceError. The default React 18 dev behavior unmounts the offending tree, leaving only the static 'Made with Emergent' badge visible. Mitigation: import useEffect and add `const ALL_TEAM_LABELS = CHAMPIONS.map(c => ({ label: `${c.season} ${c.club}`, crest: c.crest }));` (or seasons-based labels) at module scope above the SlotSpinner component. Separately, App.js line 173 has a stray '}' after `/>}` which leaks into the JSX as a text node; remove it.
